import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if in_tok
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        mut v = 0
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          v = x
        when None
          v = 0
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        start = i
        in_tok = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    mut v = 0
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      v = x
    when None
      v = 0
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

mut line1 = ""

  let y = get_or_zero(b, k)
  let s = x + y
  println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
